claim_ceiling: partial package-scale diagnostic replay; closeout stalled

stage_artifacts.name: Package admission
stage_artifacts.purpose: Show package-scale intake and dependency context before treating any runtime target as product proof.

consumes.name: fixture package manifest
consumes.proof_meaning: Captures package shape, dependency context, and target roles.

emits.name: package intake summary
emits.proof_meaning: 8 bundled binary entries represented without publishing binaries.

proves.name: package boundary
proves.proof_meaning: Batch B is partial package-scale diagnostic evidence: live campaign rows exist, but closeout stalled.

stage_artifacts.name: Runtime target selection
stage_artifacts.purpose: Separate dependency-only binaries from the curated runtime targets that would receive deeper analysis.

consumes.name: bundled binary role list
consumes.proof_meaning: Preserves role and confidence labels from the package manifest.

emits.name: selected runtime target list
emits.proof_meaning: 8 runtime targets selected from 8 bundled entries.

proves.name: target selection rationale
proves.proof_meaning: Shows why package breadth does not imply every binary is deeply probed immediately.

stage_artifacts.name: Package-scale blocker harvest
stage_artifacts.purpose: Show the partial live package run: most rows reached done, but one reporting row stalled in closeout/status propagation.

consumes.name: partial live Batch B campaign
consumes.proof_meaning: Campaign b32b323a reached 7/8 terminal rows; one row remained closeout-stalled.

emits.name: partial diagnostic package replay
emits.proof_meaning: Conservatively marks Batch B as partial diagnostic: useful package-scale pressure, not product-green proof.

proves.name: closeout stalled boundary
proves.proof_meaning: Prevents 7/8 package progress and verified findings from being mistaken for clean comparable closeout.

stage_artifacts.name: Reporting closeout stall
stage_artifacts.purpose: Localize the Batch B blocker to campaign closeout/status propagation after the reporting row produced findings.

consumes.name: reporting findings signal
consumes.proof_meaning: contoso_reporting wrote findings, so the blocker is not simply missing analyzer output.

emits.name: closeout/status blocker
emits.proof_meaning: The row stayed exploring/running after findings, so the public claim must remain diagnostic.

proves.name: fail-closed package claim
proves.proof_meaning: 7/8 completed rows and verified annotations are useful pressure evidence, but they do not satisfy clean Batch B closeout.
